ec2.transitgatewaymulticastdomain.CfnAbo:
Creates a multicast domain using the specified transit gateway.

The transit gateway must be in the available state before you create a domain.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastdomain.Option.Description: The options for the transit gateway multicast domain.  + AutoAcceptSharedAssociations (enable | disable)+ Igmpv2Support (enable | disable)+ StaticSourcesSupport (enable | disable)

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastdomain.Tags.Description: The tags for the transit gateway multicast domain.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastdomain.Transi.Description: The ID of the transit gateway.
